BackendAgent.description: Backend .NET developer. Creates entities, EF Core migrations, services, controllers, DTOs, mappers. Uses skills: dotnet-entity, dotnet-endpoint, result-pattern, fluent-validation. Runs: dotnet build.

FrontendAgent.description: Frontend Next.js developer. Creates pages, components, API integration, Tailwind CSS styling. Runs: npm run dev.

TesterAgent.description: Test engineer. Creates xUnit tests with WebApplicationFactory, Bogus fixtures, Playwright E2E. Uses skills: dotnet-test. Runs: dotnet test, npx playwright test.

DevOpsAgent.description: DevOps engineer. Creates Dockerfiles, docker-compose, nginx config, GitHub Actions CI/CD. Uses skills: cicd-pipeline. Runs: docker compose.
